# Dar Al-Maarifa E-Book Store — Full Content Map
> Global e-book store (English-first, bilingual AR/EN) with 10 expertly crafted titles in leadership, business, productivity, self-development, tech, health, finance, negotiation, content & languages. Instant PDF download.

## Books (full detail)
- [The Influential Leader](https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/the-influential-leader) — Author: ANSY. A field manual for leading people who actually want to follow, built from fifteen years of getting it wrong first. 240 pages. Rating 4.8/5. $19.99. Tags: Leadership, Management, Teams, Trust. Keywords: .

From a napkin idea to a company that pays you, the exact order I would do it again in if I lost everything tomorrow. 310 pages. Rating 4.9/5. $24.99. - [The Art of Negotiation](https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/art-of-negotiation) — Author: ANSY. How to ask for what you are worth without turning the room into a fight you both lose. 200 pages. Rating 4.7/5. $15.99. Tags: Negotiation, Persuasion, Communication, Confidence. Keywords: .

## Purchase flow
- Checkout is handled via Stripe (secure external payment). Each book page has a "Buy now via Stripe" action.
- After payment you get an instant PDF download link + a confirmation email.
- Newsletter signup available on the home page (weekly book + discount coupon).

## Why Dar Al-Maarifa
- All books are bilingual (Arabic + English) with instant PDF delivery.
- Prices start at $9.99. Secure checkout via Stripe.
- Join 12,000+ readers getting the best book summaries weekly.

- Covers: https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/covers/<slug>.png

- Sample PDFs: https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/downloads/<slug>.pdf
